subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the main idea of the lesson 'Wisdom Paves the Way'
Identify the role of wisdom in solving problems
Recognize the sequence of events in the story
Develop reading comprehension and vocabulary skills
Understand the moral conveyed in the story

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Wisdom and Decision Making
topics_covered: Examples of wise decisions in daily life
student_activities: Discuss situations where careful thinking solves problems

lesson_plan.title: Reading and Understanding the Story
topics_covered: Understanding the setting of the story
Key events in the beginning of the story
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of difficult words and phrases
student_activities: Underline unfamiliar words and note their meanings

lesson_plan.title: Understanding the Conflict
topics_covered: Problem or conflict in the story
student_activities: Identify the main conflict in the story
Discuss how the problem could be solved

lesson_plan.title: Resolution and Moral
topics_covered: How wisdom helps solve the problem
Moral or message of the lesson
student_activities: Write the moral of the story
Discuss how wisdom helps in real life

lesson_plan.title: Revision and Language Practice
student_activities: Write a short summary of the story

teacher_tip: Encourage students to connect the lesson with real-life situations where careful thinking and wisdom help solve problems.
